display.purpose: Hero headlines and major empty states only.

headline.purpose: Section headings and major dashboard groupings.

title.purpose: Product cards, report previews, and panel headings.

label.purpose: Rare orientation labels; do not repeat above every section.

shadows.name: panel-lift
shadows.purpose: Workflow surfaces, report previews, auth panels, and dashboard panels.

shadows.name: featured-product
shadows.purpose: Marks the primary product without floating-card decoration.

motion.name: ease-state
motion.purpose: Button hover and low-risk state feedback.

motion.name: reduced-motion
motion.purpose: Disable smooth scrolling and collapse animation duration.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main commercial action for starting a valuation or continuing a workflow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { align-items: center; background: #9bc83d; border: 0; border-radius: 7px; color: #142208; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 760; gap: 9px; justify-content: center; min-height: 46px; padding: 0 18px; transition: background-color 160ms ease, transform 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #acd94c; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(155, 200, 61, 0.72); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-risk navigation action used beside the primary button.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { align-items: center; background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d8e1eb; border-radius: 7px; color: #126a9f; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 760; justify-content: center; min-height: 46px; padding: 0 16px; transition: background-color 160ms ease, border-color 160ms ease; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: #f4f7fa; border-color: #126a9f; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(155, 200, 61, 0.72); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Text Field
components.description: Standard data-entry field for auth, upload, and customer details.
components.css: .ds-field { color: #13202f; display: grid; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 760; gap: 8px; margin: 0; } .ds-field input { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d8e1eb; border-radius: 7px; color: #13202f; font: inherit; min-height: 46px; padding: 0 12px; width: 100%; } .ds-field input:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(155, 200, 61, 0.72); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Brand Navigation
components.html:
aAccountIQ
PricingProofSign in
components.css: .ds-nav { align-items: center; display: flex; gap: 24px; justify-content: space-between; max-width: 1180px; } .ds-brand { align-items: center; color: #13202f; display: inline-flex; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.28rem; font-weight: 800; gap: 10px; min-height: 44px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-brand-mark { align-items: center; background: #0a3d62; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: inset 0 -10px 0 rgba(155, 200, 61, 0.28); color: #ffffff; display: inline-flex; font-size: 1.25rem; font-weight: 900; height: 34px; justify-content: center; width: 34px; } .ds-nav-links { align-items: center; display: flex; gap: 14px; } .ds-nav-links a { align-items: center; color: #607084; display: inline-flex; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 650; justify-content: center; min-height: 44px; min-width: 44px; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav a:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(155, 200, 61, 0.72); outline-offset: 3px; }

components.name: Report Preview Card
components.description: Signature preview surface that demonstrates report content and review status.
components.html:
Valuation Advisory
RevenueNZ$1.25m
EBITDANZ$235k
Indicative rangeNZ$1.8m - NZ$2.4m
Todd review step
components.css: .ds-report { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d8e1eb; border-radius: 8px; box-shadow: 0 6px 14px rgba(19, 32, 47, 0.08); color: #13202f; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; padding: 22px; width: 360px; } .ds-report-header { border-bottom: 1px solid #d8e1eb; font-weight: 800; padding-bottom: 16px; } .ds-row { align-items: center; border-bottom: 1px solid #d8e1eb; display: flex; justify-content: space-between; min-height: 64px; } .ds-row span { color: #607084; font-size: 0.9rem; font-weight: 650; } .ds-row strong { color: #126a9f; font-size: 1.15rem; } .ds-review { background: #eef7db; border-radius: 6px; color: #557a14; font-weight: 760; margin-top: 18px; padding: 12px; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Flat product offer card with optional primary-product inset marker.
components.html:
Business Valuation Report

Fixed fee from NZ$2,250 + GST

Fixed-fee valuation report for SME owners, advisers, and planning conversations.
components.css: .ds-product { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #d8e1eb; border-radius: 8px; color: #13202f; font-family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; min-height: 230px; padding: 24px; } .ds-product-featured { border-color: rgba(18, 106, 159, 0.42); box-shadow: inset 0 4px 0 #126a9f; } .ds-product h3 { color: #126a9f; font-size: 1.1rem; margin: 0 0 18px; } .ds-product strong { display: block; font-size: 1.32rem; line-height: 1.2; margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-product p { color: #607084; line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview:
AccountIQ should feel like a calm working file that has already passed through a careful professional's hands. The interface is direct, legible, and commercially credible; it leads with the fixed-fee valuation outcome and then proves the workflow, review step, compliance boundary, and customer status.

The visual system rejects broad SaaS platform language, generic finance stock imagery, abstract AI-first positioning, purple/blue gradient startup tropes, and decorative glassmorphism. Blue is allowed because it is the brand and trust base, but it must be paired with white space, ledger-like structure, and a measured green review accent so the product does not become another startup gradient.
keyCharacteristics: High-trust information density with readable spacing.
Human review as a visible product step.
Fixed-fee clarity before payment or document upload.
Compliance boundaries treated as product clarity, not fine print.

rules.name: The Review Accent Rule
rules.body: Review Green is a trust signal, not a theme. Use it for the primary action, review status, or a single proof cue; never wash whole sections in green.

rules.name: The No Unverified Proof Rule
rules.body: CAANZ logos, professional credentials, testimonials, and social proof are forbidden unless entitlement and permission are clear.

rules.name: The Blue With Air Rule
rules.body: Blue can carry the hero and brand, but every blue surface must be balanced by Paper, Soft Wash, or structured report UI nearby.

rules.name: The One Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: A page may use one small uppercase label to orient the user. Repeating uppercase labels above every section is forbidden.

rules.name: The Report Voice Rule
rules.body: Headings must make concrete promises about workflow, price, review, or report status. Avoid vague category labels such as "Solutions" or "Platform".

rules.name: The No Glass Rule
rules.body: Translucent cards, blur panels, frosted glass, and heavy ambient glow are prohibited.

rules.name: The Line Before Shadow Rule
rules.body: Use borders and section rhythm first. Add shadow only when a surface contains an active workflow or preview.

dos: Do lead with the concrete customer outcome: a fixed-fee indicative business valuation report.
Do build trust before asking for money or financial documents.
Do show review, payment, validation, and status as plain workflow steps.
Do use Deep Review Green (#557a14) for green text on light surfaces, and reserve Review Green (#9bc83d) for CTAs or dark-surface accents.
Do keep controls at 44px minimum touch target size where possible.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion and keep animation to state feedback only.
donts: Don't use broad SaaS platform language.
Don't use generic finance stock imagery.
Don't use purple/blue gradient startup tropes.
Don't claim "instant valuation", "certified valuation", "financial advice", "guaranteed valuation", "court-standard", or "AI replaces your adviser".
Don't use CAANZ logos, professional credentials, testimonials, or social proof unless permission and entitlement are clear.
Don't let green body text sit below WCAG AA contrast on light backgrounds.
